string.text: Spare me the overly formal intro, will you? It's not like we just met... My name? Just call me Lind.
Lind it is then... I'm happy to meet up again!
Lind, do you really need to eat so much sugar...?
Consuming too much sugar will make me malfunction, but I'll scrap myself on the spot if I don't get any right now, so I guess I should have some... Nom.
Why are you being so nice to me? ...You don't have something weird in mind, do you?
Okay Lind, please head back to base. I will handle it from here.
Where are you going? Come back soon or I'll die. That's how a dependency works, is this your first time meeting me?
